name: ghidrasql
description: GhidraSQL skills for live SQL analysis, decompilation, and annotation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and annotate Ghidra projects with ghidrasql
interface.longDescription: GhidraSQL provides Codex skills for connecting to ghidrasql, querying program structure, decompiling, tracing xrefs, inspecting data, managing types, and applying annotations.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this Ghidra project with ghidrasql
